productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Women Court White Shoes
description: Designed for those who love those healthy runs, the adidas Court combines lightweight comfort and flexibility that makes running all the more pleasurable.UpperSynthetic upper for durability and comfortReinforced overlay at the heel and stitched detailing for enhanced shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised Fitadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and stylePadded footbed for all-day comfortBranding on the tongue and at the back of the collarMidsoleTPU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleHerringbone grooves with a suction point on the outsole for tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
